use_cases: Selecting multiple tags or categories in content management systems
Filtering products by multiple attributes in e-commerce catalogs
Assigning labels to tasks or items in productivity applications
Multi-select filtering in data dashboards and analytics tools
Content tagging for blogs, videos, or digital asset libraries
ai_summary: A multi-select tag input component with smooth scroll behavior and layout animations using framer-motion. Supports custom tag rendering, selection/deselection of multiple items, and auto-scroll to newly added tags. Styled with flat, minimal aesthetics using Tailwind CSS with border and shadow accents for tag chips.
